childReport.manualNotes: plan.md and progress.md were missing at review start; review used full src/ + plugin manifest + open-corral.sh. Framework shape is sound for a scaffold; highest-value pre-feature fixes are RAII terminal restore, pane_id split, rename success tracking, and a small host/feature unit-test bed. Do not treat global j/k as permanent shell bindings.
